info.title: OpenAPI specification - amachi-platform
info.description: This API exposes endpoints to manage amachi-platform

tags.name: Municipio
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles del municipio: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: Gender
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de géneros (MDM).

tags.name: Allergy
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de alergias (MDM).

tags.name: Medical Specialty
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo maestro de especialidades médicas (MDM).

tags.name: Tenant Admin Management
tags.description: Gestión de administradores de tenants

tags.name: Account
tags.description: Gestión de cuentas de usuario (activación, contraseñas, perfil)

tags.name: TenantConfig
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de tenantConfigs: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: Kinship
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo maestro de parentescos (MDM).

tags.name: User Invitations
tags.description: REST API for the two-step user onboarding flow: Admin sends invitation → User completes self-registration.

tags.name: Healthcare Provider
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de aseguradoras y pagadores de salud (MDM).

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Gestión de autenticación de usuarios (login, registro, tokens)

tags.name: Blood Type
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo maestro de tipos de sangre (MDM).

tags.name: Role
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de roles: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: Civil Status
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de estado civil (MDM).

tags.name: Medication
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de medicamentos (Vademécum - MDM).

tags.name: Tenant
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de tenants: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: Medical Procedure
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de procedimientos médicos y laboratorios (MDM).

tags.name: Theme
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de temas visuales: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: ICD-10 Diagnosis
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de diagnósticos CIE-10 (MDM).

tags.name: Employee
tags.description: Gestión de personal médico y administrativo (Employees)

tags.name: Departamento
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de departamentos: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: Address
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de addresses: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: Provincia
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de provincias: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: TenantAdmin
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles del tenant admin: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: UserTenantRole
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de países: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: Country
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles de países: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: SuperAdmin
tags.description: REST API para gestionar detalles del Super Admin: crear, actualizar, obtener y eliminar.

tags.name: Hospital
tags.description: REST API to manage professional Hospital details: create, update, retrieve and delete.

tags.name: Identification Type
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de tipos de identificación (MDM).

tags.name: Vaccine
tags.description: REST API para gestionar el catálogo de vacunas (MDM).

get.description: Returns a Hospital object by specified ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the Hospital to retrieve

400.description: Invalid request: Null ID or incomplete data.

put.description: Updates an existing Hospital using its ID and provided data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the Hospital to update.

400.description: Invalid request: Null ID or incomplete data.

delete.description: Deletes an existing Hospital using its ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the Hospital to delete.

400.description: Invalid request: Null or invalid ID.

post.description: Registra un nuevo usuario dentro del tenant especificado
Genera un nuevo access token usando el refresh token válido
Invalida el refresh token actual y el access token
Verifica las credenciales del usuario y devuelve el JWT

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all invitations emitted by the specified tenant. Useful for rendering the invitations administrative dashboard.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Size of the records per page.

200.description: Paginated list of invitations successfully retrieved.

403.description: Not authorized to read this tenant's data.

post.description: Creates a pending Invitation and sends an activation email to the specified address. Requires TENANT_ADMIN role.

400.description: Invalid request data (missing fields, bad email format).

409.description: A pending invitation already exists for this email in the tenant.

post.description: Generates a new secure token, pushes back the expiration date by 48 hours, and dispatches a fresh email to the original recipient. Applicable for PENDING or EXPIRED invitations; fails if ACCEPTED.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The database ID of the target UserInvitation to resend.

400.description: Cannot resend an already ACCEPTED invitation.

404.description: Invitation ID not found in the Database.

post.description: The invited person submits their personal details and credentials. The system creates the User + Person accounts and activates them immediately (auto-activation — no additional Admin approval required).

400.description: Invalid form data (missing required fields, weak password, bad email).

404.description: Token not found, expired, or already accepted.

409.description: The chosen login email is already registered in the system.

get.description: Verifica si un JWT sigue siendo válido (útil para mantener sesión)
Verifies that the given token corresponds to a PENDING, non-expired Invitation. Called by the frontend before rendering the onboarding form.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: One-time token from the invitation URL.

200.description: Token is valid. Returns invitation metadata.

400.description: Token parameter missing.

404.description: Token not found, expired, or already accepted.

get.description: Devuelve la lista completa de Address

200.description: Lista de Address recuperada con éxito.

get.description: Devuelve la información básica del usuario autenticado

delete.description: Desactiva la cuenta del usuario autenticado y cierra la sesión

UserAccountDto.description: Data Transfer Object for UserAccount entity

UserDto.description: Data Transfer Object for User entity

password.description: User password (only for creation or update)

roles.description: Roles assigned to the user in the current context

user.description: User associated with the role assignment

tenantId.description: Tenant associated with the role assignment

role.description: Role assigned to the user in the tenant context

assignedAt.description: Fecha en que se asignó el rol

revokedAt.description: Fecha en que se revocó el rol

bloque.description: Bloque al que pertenece el address

numeroDepartamento.description: Numero de departamento de la Direccion

fechaNacimiento.description: La fecha de nacimiento de la Persona

globalAccess.description: Indica si el SuperAdmin tiene acceso global

isActive.description: Indicates if the Tenant is active

description.example: This is the main hospital tenant.

themeId.description: Theme ID associated with the Tenant

themeName.description: Theme Name associated with the Tenant

fechaNacimiento.description: La fecha de nacimiento de la Persona

tenant.description: Datos del Tenant (Para vinculación o creación)

departamentoId.description: ID Departamento al que pertenece la Provincia

provinciaId.description: ID Provincia al que pertenece el Municipio

Vaccine.description: Detalles de la Vaccine a crear.

MedicalProcedure.description: Detalles del Medical Procedure a crear.

MedicalSpecialty.description: Detalles de la Medical Specialty a crear.

description.example: Especialidad dedicada al estudio y tratamiento del corazón.

IdentificationType.description: Detalles del Identification Type a crear.

HealthcareProvider.description: Detalles del Healthcare Provider a crear.

Icd10.description: Detalles del ICD-10 Diagnosis a crear.

description.example: Cholera due to Vibrio cholerae 01, biovar cholerae

CivilStatus.description: Detalles del Civil Status a crear.

BloodType.description: Detalles del Blood Type a crear.

Hospital.description: Details of the Hospital to create.

isActive.description: Indicates if the Tenant is active

description.example: This is the main hospital tenant.

themeId.description: Theme ID associated with the Tenant

themeName.description: Theme Name associated with the Tenant

hospitalCategory.description: Categoría o nivel del hospital (e.g. Nivel III)

slogan.example: Tecnología al servicio de la vida

Employee.description: Esquema que contiene la información detallada de un empleado (Médico, Administrativo, etc.)

fechaNacimiento.description: La fecha de nacimiento de la Persona

fkIdUser.description: ID del usuario asociado para login

countryId.description: Pais al que pertenece el Departamento

AssignRolesRequest.description: Assign or unassign role names to a user in a tenant

roleNames.description: Lista de nombres de roles a asignar o desasignar

personName.description: Nombre completo derivado de la entidad Person

personType.description: Tipo de persona (DOCTOR, NURSE, PATIENT, etc.)

roles.description: Roles del usuario dentro del tenant actual

InvitationRequest.description: Invitation details provided by the TenantAdmin.

email.description: Recipient email for the invitation link.

roleName.description: Role name to assign to the user after onboarding.

InvitationResponse.description: Response payload carrying the result of an invitation operation.

email.description: Email that received the invitation link.

roleName.description: Role that will be granted upon acceptance.

expiresAt.description: Expiration timestamp of the one-time link.

CompleteRegistrationRequest.description: Self-onboarding form submitted by the invited person.

token.description: One-time activation token from the invitation URL.

loginEmail.description: Definitive login email (User.email). Can be professional or personal.

personalEmail.description: Personal contact email (Person.email). Different from the login email.
